tool.name: Databricks Genie Spaces
tool.description: Natural-language data assistant surface for exploring selected enterprise datasets inside Databricks.
strengths: Business-insight workflow inside the Databricks workspace
tool.pricing: Packaged as part of Databricks AI assistive features; Databricks workspace and compute usage still apply.
tool.logoNotes: Official Databricks wordmark reused across Databricks product entries because the public Databricks brand portal exposes the vendor lockup, while Genie Spaces does not expose a distinct standalone public mark.
tool.practitionerNote: Better treated as a governed internal data-assistant surface than a broad office-suite copilot replacement.

dataResidency.detail: AI assistive feature using Databricks Geos; residency per workspace region.

deployment.detail: SaaS within the Databricks workspace (multi-cloud); no standalone option.

auditLogging.detail: Audit events to the system.access.audit system table; SQL-queryable.

soc2.detail: Databricks SOC 2 Type II across clouds.

iso42001.detail: No Databricks ISO 42001 certification found as of 2026-05.

euAiAct.detail: Assessed limited-risk by product category; no published vendor EU AI Act conformity assessment.

licenseRisk.detail: Proprietary SaaS; Unity Catalog / workspace lock-in (multi-cloud eases portability).
